parameters.query: INSERT INTO patients (phone, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{($json.phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}', '{{($json.pushName || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}', NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, patients.name), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO conversation_state (phone, state, context, last_seen_at, expires_at)
VALUES ('{{($json.phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}', 'INITIAL', '{}', NOW(), NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes')
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE
  SET last_seen_at = NOW(),
      expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO conversation_log (phone, intent, confidence, message_text, response_text, message_id, direction, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{($('Normalizar Payload').first().json.phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{($('Detecta Intenção').first().json.intent || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  {{ $('Detecta Intenção').first().json.confidence || 0 }},
  '{{($('Normalizar Payload').first().json.text || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{($('Gera Resposta').first().json.reply || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  '{{($('Normalizar Payload').first().json.messageId || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  'inbound',
  NOW()
);

SELECT COALESCE(
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'id', id, 'specialty', specialty, 'doctor', doctor,
      'data', TO_CHAR(start_time AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo','DD/MM/YYYY'),
      'hora', TO_CHAR(start_time AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo','HH24:MI')
    ) ORDER BY start_time
  ),
  '[]'::json
) AS appointments
FROM appointments
WHERE phone = '{{($('Normalizar Payload').first().json.phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}' 
  AND status IN ('confirmed','pending')
  AND start_time > NOW();

SELECT COALESCE(
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'id', id, 'specialty', specialty, 'doctor', doctor,
      'data', TO_CHAR(start_time AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo','DD/MM/YYYY'),
      'hora', TO_CHAR(start_time AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo','HH24:MI'),
      'status', status
    ) ORDER BY start_time
  ),
  '[]'::json
) AS appointments
FROM appointments
WHERE phone = '{{($('Normalizar Payload').first().json.phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}' 
  AND status IN ('confirmed','pending')
  AND start_time > NOW();

UPDATE conversation_state
SET state = 'AWAITING_SPECIALTY',
    last_intent  = 'AGENDAR',
    last_seen_at = NOW(),
    expires_at   = NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
WHERE phone = '{{($("Interpreta Contexto").first().json.phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}';
SELECT state FROM conversation_state WHERE phone = '{{($("Interpreta Contexto").first().json.phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}';

INSERT INTO patients (phone, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{($json.phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}', '{{($json.pushName || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}', NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, patients.name), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING *;
